[{"Name":"Ahmed Ali Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtkifKOXKH5RvMBt1IyZta8coSn2E1jonLgNeMhTU4bUd6X5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I usually don’t post reviews, but this one’s different.

We had a lot of bad experiences with companies offering web design and development services in Hyderabad. Most of them talked big but delivered slow, poorly built websites that didn’t even work well on mobile or show up on Google.

Then we found Bixeltek, and the experience was a total game-changer.

To be sure, I personally visited agencies in Hitech City, Madhapur, Kondapur, and Jubilee Hills. Most of them operated from coworking spaces with very small teams and no proper in-house web development, SEO, or social media team.

My vision was clear — to build one of the best interior design companies in Hyderabad and India, with a western touch, and I wanted end-to-end services from one agency:
logo design, website design, SEO, social media marketing, Google ranking, and brand strategy.

Their experienced in-house team handled everything — website design, SEO services, Google My Business (GMB) optimization, social media marketing, and performance ads. I could see hundreds of premium client portfolios, including interior design brands.

After an insightful 2-hour discussion covering not only my project but also business growth, AI-driven marketing, and global trends, I confidently finalized the project.

Highly recommended digital marketing agency and web development company in Hyderabad, especially for interior designers, architects, and premium brands looking for local SEO and complete brand execution.

Happy to recommend them to anyone looking for a reliable digital marketing partner.","text_translated":"","published_at":"2026-05-30T14:20:56.782515Z"},{"Name":"Ghadiya Tushal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhDyNJdthjqWveY9E38bdAf5UOLPdAPlKv66CnEpA2aip8OA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a very disappointing experience with Minduntz.

After my employment ended, the company still owed my ₹33,671 in salary. As instructed, I couriered the company laptop back to the CEO. If there had been any issue or damage with the laptop, the condition should have been shared immediately—within a day or two of receiving it.
